# Breaking News: Sherlock caught Cheaters using cheating app called Interview Coder in Job Interview

Before Sherlock

After Sherlock

AI Agent that sees what traditional proctors can't

## Meet Sherlock: Your AI Test Integrity Agent

**Clear Insights, Confident Decisions**

Stop debating test validity. Sherlock provides clear evidence of suspicious activities, helping you make confident decisions about results.

**Smarter Than Traditional Proctoring**

Old proctoring tools play catch-up. Sherlock stays ahead, using AI to detect all the cheating techniques in real-time. From hidden devices to voice patterns, nothing gets past Sherlock.

**Beyond Basic Rules**

While others use rigid checklists, Sherlock understands context. Our AI analyzes behavior patterns, distinguishing genuine actions from suspicious ones. No more false alarms.

**Real-Time Protection That Never Sleeps**

Gone are the days of missing sophisticated cheaters. Sherlock actively monitors every session, analyzing video, audio, and system signals simultaneously.

## Test Integrity You Can Trust

Protect What Matters

Traditional monitoring hopes to catch cheating. We prevent it. Sherlock's AI agent detects all cheating methods in real-time, turning uncertainty into confidence. Finally, results you can trust completely.

Eliminate Manual Oversight

Automate the proctoring process and eliminate the need for manual review, so your team can focus on other important tasks.

**Improve Candidate Experience**

Most proctoring feels like surveillance. Sherlock works differently. Give candidates a professional experience they deserve while maintaining complete test integrity. That's modern monitoring done right.

# Frequently ASked Questions

## FAQs

Everything you need to know about the product and functionality. Can’t find the answer you’re looking for? Please chat to our team.

What makes Sherlock different from traditional proctoring?

Traditional tools follow basic rules. Sherlock's AI understands context, catching all sophisticated cheating methods that others miss. That's complete confidence in every result.

Can Sherlock handle our testing volume?

Absolutely. Whether it's 10 tests or 10,000, Sherlock monitors them all simultaneously with consistent accuracy. Every test gets the same intelligent protection, no matter the scale.

What type of reports are available?

When suspicious activity occurs, Sherlock delivers clear insights, not just alerts. Each report shows exactly what happened, with video evidence and behavior patterns for confident decision-making.

How does Sherlock adapt to new cheating methods?

Unlike static tools that follow fixed rules, Sherlock's AI continuously learns and evolves. Every new pattern, every sophisticated attempt gets caught - keeping your tests one step ahead.

What makes Sherlock's alerts reliable?

Traditional tools flood you with false alarms. Sherlock's AI understands context, sending alerts only when real suspicious activity occurs. That's protection you can trust.

## Want to End Test Integrity Worries?

Leading organizations already protect their assessments with Sherlock. Join them in making every test count.
